data.title: Oil stays undersupplied as OPEC+ struggles to meet new output targets
data.description:

Since April, the group’s eight major producers have been trying to lift output in phases, aiming to add 2. 5 million barrels per day (bpd) by September compared to March levels. But data shows that the […]

data.title: Pharos Network partners with Morpho to launch native lending infrastructure for real-world assets
data.description:
Pharos Network, a Layer 1 blockchain focused on RWAfi, has partnered with Morpho, a lending network with over $9 billion in total deposits, to bring native lending infrastructure to the Pharos mainnet, as reported to Finbold on August 7.  Thrilled to announce Pharos will integrate with @MorphoLabs, one of the most trusted lending networksBy embedding Morpho’s lending framework into the Pharos Mainnet, we support intricate, institutional-grade strategies while maintaining the adaptability and openness synonymous… pic.twitter.com/iVnvfkm33V— Pharos | Testnet Live (@pharos_network) August 7, 2025 The collaboration aims to establish institutional-grade lending rails within the on-chain real-world asset ecosystem

data.title: Waller Emerges as Leading Candidate for Federal Reserve Chair
data.description: According to BlockBeats, market sources indicate that Waller has become a leading candidate for the position of Federal Reserve Chair within U.S. President Donald Trump's team. Waller has reportedly met with Trump's team, although a direct meeting with Trump has not yet occurred. It is noted that Trump's team favors Waller's inclination towards interest rate cuts based on forecasts.

data.title: Blockchain's Role in Revolutionizing Agriculture and Addressing Global Challenges
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, the integration of blockchain technology into agriculture is emerging as a promising solution to some of the world's most pressing issues, such as food waste and land disputes. Yana Leonova, who holds a PhD in agricultural economics and is actively involved in Dubai's innovation ecosystem, highlights the potential of blockchain in transforming the agricultural sector. She emphasizes that blockchain can significantly enhance supply chain transparency, citing projects like IBM Food Trust and WWF’s OpenSC, which are already utilizing blockchain to track products such as seafood and palm oil.

In the United Arab Emirates, the Farm to Plate initiative exemplifies blockchain's impact by reducing food waste by an estimated $6 billion through improved visibility and real-time supply-demand matching. Leonova explains that blockchain provides a comprehensive real-time data picture, which is crucial in today's data-driven world. Beyond logistics, blockchain empowers smallholders by eliminating intermediaries and ensuring fair and automatic payments through tokens and smart contracts. This technological advancement ensures that farmers receive fair compensation for their produce without the interference of middlemen.

The discussion also delves into the philosophical implications of blockchain, particularly its role in ensuring justice. Leonova points out that immutable ledgers can safeguard land ownership rights, especially in situations where traditional paper records are lost due to disasters. She asserts that blockchain's incorruptible nature prevents any unauthorized claims on property, emphasizing that "nobody can impose their rights on your property" and "you cannot bribe the blockchain." Co-hosts Nathan Jeffay and Gareth Jenkinson highlight how these practical applications challenge the perception of blockchain as merely a tool for speculation, underscoring its potential to address tangible real-world problems.

Despite some skepticism surrounding blockchain adoption, Leonova remains optimistic about its future. She acknowledges that while it may take time for people to recognize and adapt to blockchain technology, once trust is established, it can play a significant role in benefiting humanity. The conversation on "The Clear Crypto Podcast" further explores these themes, offering insights into how blockchain is poised to revolutionize various sectors beyond agriculture. For those interested in the full discussion, the episode is available on Cointelegraph’s Podcasts page, Apple Podcasts, and Spotify.

data.title: Worksport's Bitcoin Holdings Double Following Crypto Strategy
data.description: According to Foresight News, U.S. truck manufacturer Worksport (NASDAQ: WKSP) has announced that its Bitcoin holdings have doubled since the implementation of its cryptocurrency financial strategy in December 2024. The company highlighted that its digital asset portfolio, which includes Bitcoin and XRP, has increased by approximately 15% since the initial purchase. The specific details of their holdings will be disclosed in the second quarter financial results for 2025, scheduled for release on August 13, 2025.

data.title: Mind Network Launches Encrypted Messaging Protocol for Real-World Asset Scenarios
data.description:
According to PANews, Mind Network has officially introduced a new protocol called Encrypted Messaging Onchain, designed to provide native compliance, privacy, and communication capabilities for real-world asset scenarios such as real estate, stablecoin settlements, and cross-border payments.

The solution supports automatic wallet key generation, enabling end-to-end encryption. It allows users to attach structured, encrypted, and verifiable messages to any transaction, meeting compliance requirements for information on purpose, identity, and auditing in financial activities. This mechanism is similar to standard messaging systems used in traditional finance and cross-border trade.

Encrypted Messaging Onchain integrates fully homomorphic encryption (FHE) with traditional cryptographic techniques to ensure that sensitive data can only be accessed by authorized parties. Officials noted that the blockchain sector currently lacks such an encryption messaging standard for real-world assets, and this protocol is expected to become a crucial component in building an "on-chain SWIFT" infrastructure, advancing the compliance process within the crypto ecosystem.

data.title: Trump opens $12.5 trillion 401(k) market to crypto and private equity access
data.description:
